title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXL. Games.
content:
This pig went to market,
            Squeak mouse, mouse, mousey;
        Shoe, shoe, shoe the wild colt,
            And here's my own doll, Dowsy.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCXL. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
